findings.message: mod.ts has 22 non-export/non-comment lines — barrels must be export-only
mod.ts lacks section comment headers — recommended for navigability
type 'LogLevelConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
type 'LoggingConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
exported function 'injectLogger' uses non-standard prefix 'inject' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'injectRequestId' uses non-standard prefix 'inject' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'loggerMiddleware' uses non-standard prefix 'logger' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'requestLoggerMiddleware' uses non-standard prefix 'request' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'resetLogging' uses non-standard prefix 'reset' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
README missing 10/12 mandated sections (Overview, Quickstart, Mental model, API, Recipes, Configuration, Testing, Observability, Architecture, Stability, Compatibility, License)
mod.ts does not export an `inspect<Noun>()` diagnostic — recommended discoverability axis
